plan_summary.plan_name: Denmark DKK to EUR Adoption (Builder's Blueprint)
plan_summary.primary_goal: Achieve full DKK to EUR currency adoption within 4-8 years via ERM II, referendum, and Eurosystem integration.
plan_summary.modelling_frame: Tests budget allocation, referendum and awareness thresholds, contingency reserve vs cash shock, and real-budget protection against inflation.

key_values.label: Total national transition budget
key_values.comment: Budgeted public financing for the multi-year transition; stated range DKK 15-25 billion, central estimate used.
key_values.source_text: reference range for budgeted public financing: DKK 15-25 Billion

key_values.label: Ring-fenced contingency reserve
key_values.comment: Ring-fenced reserve for unbudgeted security enhancements during 30-day dual circulation.
key_values.source_text: contingency capital ring-fenced fund amount: DKK 50 million

key_values.label: Public information funding share of budget
key_values.comment: Minimum allocation share of total transition budget dedicated to public information campaign.
key_values.source_text: Public information funding: 0.5% of total national transition budget

key_values.label: Minimum referendum support threshold
key_values.comment: Minimum public support level required to interpret referendum mandate as sufficient.
key_values.source_text: If referendum support levels drop below 60%, then the vote mandate may be insufficient.

key_values.label: Minimum public awareness threshold
key_values.comment: Minimum awareness of referendum details required to keep campaign pacing on track.
key_values.source_text: If public awareness of referendum details reaches less than 70%, then the campaign pacing must be adjusted.

key_values.label: Annual real-indexation factor for budget
key_values.comment: Proposed annual uplift factor applied to budget to preserve real value over multi-year transition.
key_values.source_text: proposed annual real-indexation factor for budget: 1.015

missing_values_to_estimate.label: Actual public support level at referendum
missing_values_to_estimate.why_needed: Compared against support threshold to determine whether the referendum mandate is sufficient.
missing_values_to_estimate.suggested_estimation_method: Use rolling Danish opinion polls on euro adoption with confidence interval around campaign period.

missing_values_to_estimate.label: Actual public awareness of referendum details
missing_values_to_estimate.why_needed: Compared against awareness threshold to test whether campaign pacing meets the gate.
missing_values_to_estimate.suggested_estimation_method: Estimate from analogous EU member referendum awareness surveys; bound 0.4 to 0.9.

missing_values_to_estimate.label: Baseline annual inflation rate over transition
missing_values_to_estimate.why_needed: Used to test whether the real-indexation factor keeps pace with actual budget erosion.
missing_values_to_estimate.suggested_estimation_method: Use ECB/Danish CPI projections; central around 0.02 with 0.01-0.04 range for stress.

missing_values_to_estimate.label: Dual circulation cash logistics shock cost
missing_values_to_estimate.why_needed: Compared against contingency reserve to test whether the reserve can absorb the cash supply shock.
missing_values_to_estimate.suggested_estimation_method: Anchor on stated DKK 100M overhead scenario; bound DKK 30M to 200M.

recommended_first_calculations.label: Public information campaign budget
recommended_first_calculations.why_first: Sizes the campaign envelope and anchors downstream awareness and referendum-support work.

recommended_first_calculations.label: Referendum support margin over threshold
recommended_first_calculations.why_first: Pass/fail gate determining whether the referendum mandate is strong enough for accession.

recommended_first_calculations.label: Public awareness margin over threshold
recommended_first_calculations.why_first: Tests whether campaign pacing meets the awareness gate before referendum scheduling.

recommended_first_calculations.label: Contingency reserve buffer against cash shock
recommended_first_calculations.why_first: Tests whether the ring-fenced reserve covers the cash logistics shock scenario.

recommended_first_calculations.label: Real indexation margin over inflation
recommended_first_calculations.why_first: Tests whether annual indexation keeps committed budget value above realised inflation.

unmodelled_gates.label: EU Council opt-out protocol amendment
unmodelled_gates.why_it_matters: Requires unanimous EU agreement on a targeted protocol amendment to lift the Danish opt-out; outside any quantitative threshold.
unmodelled_gates.consequence_if_false: Legal pathway stalls and the entire adoption sequence cannot proceed regardless of budget or convergence.

unmodelled_gates.label: National referendum yields mandate
unmodelled_gates.why_it_matters: Binary Yes/No referendum mandate is a hard democratic gate independent of any modelled support margin.
unmodelled_gates.consequence_if_false: Project terminates; sunk costs written off and EU opt-out remains in place.

unmodelled_gates.label: ECB convergence criteria approval
unmodelled_gates.why_it_matters: ECB must approve fulfilment of Maastricht convergence criteria after 24 months of ERM II participation.
unmodelled_gates.consequence_if_false: Euro adoption is blocked or delayed pending further fiscal adjustment and re-assessment.
